🏆 Top 8 Products by Revenue
🗺️ Revenue Heatmap: Category × Region
🔮 Revenue Forecast — Next 3 Months (Polynomial Regression)
ℹ️ Methodology
Polynomial regression (degree 2) on 12 months of monthly revenue. The dashed line shows the predicted trajectory; the shaded band shows the ±1σ confidence range. Forecast values are annotated on the chart.
🔍 Anomaly Detection — Monthly Revenue (Z-Score Method)
ℹ️ How it works
Z-score applied on monthly aggregated revenue. Points with |Z| > 2.0 are flagged with red ✕ markers. The shaded band represents the normal range (μ ± 2σ). Anomalies indicate seasonal spikes, promotions, or data quality issues.

🔍 Auto-Detected Column Roles
dateDate column — order timestamps
revenueRevenue — primary financial metric
profitProfit — net earnings per record
costCost — COGS / expense column
regionRegion — geographic dimension
categoryCategory — product segment
productProduct — item / SKU name
customerCustomer — account name
quantityUnits — volume sold
